zh_cn.content:
Dear ByteDancer,

Completing the conflicts of interest declaration upholds our Code of Conduct and safeguards the interests of our Company and employees.

According to the [ByteDance Conflicts of Interest Policy](https://bytedance.larkoffice.com/wiki/wikcnCclEKbQr7zjCZScrn4qwpd), please declare any potential or actual conflicts of interest annually or when they arise. If none exist, please confirm. Rest assured that the personal information you submit in the declaration will be kept strictly confidential.

Please read the Policy to ensure you understand the situations you should declare. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us through Ethics OnCall.

Please complete the declaration within 7 working days of receiving this notification. Thank you for your cooperation!
